findings.detail: Integrity-status source=kv, kv_backed=true. Not mock. ATLAS reported source=live, seed_result=200 OK.
ATLAS reported GI=0.83/green at T-57m. ZEUS observed GI=0.74/yellow at verification time. 9-point drift, mode downgrade. Consistent with freshness decay.
14/20 micro-agents healthy. ZEUS-µ3 unhealthy (no signal). HERMES-µ3 and HERMES-µ4 returning zero results (watch). Freshness=0.30, information=0.30.
SIGNAL_SNAPSHOT=false, GI_STATE=false, SYSTEM_PULSE=false. 7/10 keys present. Seed completed (200 OK) but some keys not populated.
No candidates pending verification. Pipeline clear.
ATLAS flagged self-ping 401 in 28ms. Likely auth/routing issue on health endpoint. Persistent across cycles.

recommendation: Monitor ZEUS-µ3 signal restoration and self-ping 401 root cause. Freshness at 0.30 is driving GI below green threshold. No critical intervention needed but trend should be addressed within 2 cycles.
